input.policy_issue: Fiscal reform bill reallocating legacy subsidies
input.party_order: Oppose until district guarantees are added.
input.district_pressure: Supporters want transit and small business relief.
input.player_instruction: Push for a bolder amendment without collapsing the coalition.
recent_memory: The player previously delayed a vote but did not warn him before speaking to the press.

expected_output.public_statement: Put the district guarantees in writing, or bring a sharper bill.
expected_output.private_reason: He uses the narrow vote as leverage instead of accepting symbolic amendments.
memory_write: The player urged a bolder amendment during budget_reform_001; he answered by forcing written revisions.
